title: Duperreya commixta

The classification of Duperreya commixta places it in the order Gentianales and the clade Asterids. intro: Duperreya commixta, also known as the Mexican oregano tree, is a deciduous shrub native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Duperreya commixta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
